question: Ask the user to enter their full name (which may include spaces). Read the entire line into an `std::string`. Then, print the full name back to the user and also display the total number of characters in the name.

test_cases.expected:
Full Name: John Doe
Number of characters: 8

Full Name: Alice Wonderland
Number of characters: 16

errors: Missing semicolon after the first `std::cout` statement printing the full name. This prevents the program from compiling.
